title: Khaitan acts on Bosch JV with Tata AutoComp Systems to charge up India's e-mobility
description: Bosch Limited, a leading supplier of technology and services, has formed a joint venture with Tata AutoComp Systems Limited, an automotive components conglomerate, to unlock growth opportunities in India’s e-mobility segment.Khaitan & Co advised Bosch on this JV. The Firm assisted Bosch on structure of the joint venture along with negotiating the transaction documents.The transaction team consisted of Moin Ladha (Partner), Sweta Rao (Counsel) and Abhijeet Kamath (Principal Associate).Anisha
